_notes: Commonwealth of Nations membership as of May 2026: 56 states. Gabon and Togo joined in June 2022, the first members without a historical constitutional link to the United Kingdom. Charles III is Head of the Commonwealth.
name: Commonwealth of Nations
mission: Political association of 56 mostly-former-British-colony states, plus more recent accessions. Cooperation on democracy, human rights, the rule of law, economic development, and the Commonwealth Games.
